title: Zoro’s Name Reaches Luffy
main_description: Luffy and Coby arrive in Shells Town, where Captain Morgan’s power and Helmeppo’s cruelty define the town. Zoro’s reputation becomes central as Luffy begins to judge whether the feared pirate hunter might become his first crewmate.
key_events: Shells Town is introduced under Morgan’s control.
Luffy sees that Zoro is not simply a villain.
